reference: These pains and redness must be assessed for an autoimmune disorder if they persist for more than three days. Please get an erythrocyte sedimentation rate test done, along with a rheumatoid factor test and a complete blood count.
text: These pains and redness must be assessed for an autoimmune disorder if they persist for more than three days. Please get a red blood cell sedimentation test done, along with a rheumatoid factor test and a complete blood count.
